name: GAS
bio: GAS is Wolfgang Voigt's ambient-techno project, known for long-form forestlike electronic records that continue to attract deep-listening audiences.
notable_for: Immersive ambient techno, Kompakt-era catalog depth, and long-tail listening value.
career_highlight: The Pop and Konigsforst albums became canonical ambient-techno records with durable streaming and vinyl appeal.
revenue_drivers: Ambient and focus-listening playlists keep the catalog in circulation.
Vinyl reissues and collector demand help specialist physical revenue.
Cult-status electronic catalogs often hold value through depth rather than hit singles.
